div.h1: Job Table Data Structure & Thread-Safe Management

p.em: SIGCHLD blocking mechanisms for concurrent list access in POSIX shells

div.p: Implementation Note: Aligning the struct to 64 bytes prevents false sharing and ensures that a single cache-line fetch retrieves the entire metadata for traversal.
SIGCHLD is delivered asynchronously. If the handler modifies job_list while main() is traversing it, memory corruption or segfaults will occur.

ol.li: handler calls job_remove(Job A), freeing it.

g.text: FIX: Block SIGCHLD around traversal loop.
